scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && mvn -B -q package
scripts.scan:deps: node scripts/dependency-inventory.mjs --verify && npm audit --audit-level=high && mvn -B -q dependency:tree
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace frontend && mvn -B test
scripts.validate: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run scan:secrets && npm run scan:deps
